title: Historic Shinies
description: This resource pack changes some of the shiny Pokémon to have their alternate shiny palettes from official sources.
body:
This Resource Pack changes some of the shiny palettes for Pokémon to resemble their shiny palettes from other official sources.

With the launch version, the following Pokémon have altered shinies:
- Clefairy line
- Gengar
- Paras
- Seadra
- Cyndaquil line
- Tyranitar
- Rayquaza
